# b00tl3gRSA2

# Descripción
In RSA d is a lot bigger than e, why don't we use d to encrypt instead of e? Connect with nc fickle-tempest.picoctf.net 53011.

# Solución

```  
picoCTF{bad_1d3a5_3801255}
```

## Pasos para llegar a la solución

```  
Ejecutar el comando:

┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~/Downloads/Forensic041/rsa/b00tl3gRSA2]
└─$ nc fickle-tempest.picoctf.net 53011
c: 
n: 
e: 
                         
Poner esos valores en el código:

c = 

n = 
 
e = 
            

e = 65537
m = pow(c,e,n)
print(m)

flag = bytes.fromhex(hex(m)[2:]).decode()

print(flag)


Ejecutar

┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~/Downloads/Forensic041/rsa/b00tl3gRSA2]
└─$ python3 script.py 
180638594769037903267909311328535969949661653394344568289572221
picoCTF{bad_1d3a5_3801255}

```
